what_it_does: This file is a ledger-style attachment record that declares an attachment id, associates it with the dragnet-development channel, marks it as type board_items, and points to a specific board item via a board:// URI with an added timestamp.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
standouts: It is a reference/link record rather than a content-bearing document.
It uses a board:// URI scheme to target a board item.
conventions: Uses ledger metadata fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added.
Uses a URI-style reference for the target.
notes: A minimal channel attachment stub that records a timestamped link between the dragnet-development channel and board item d90ca9a0.
questions: What content or action is represented by board://item-d90ca9a0?
Was this attachment generated automatically or manually?
purpose_vs_actual: The declared purpose is to record a board_items attachment, which matches the content; the file is purely a reference/metadata record and contains no payload.
intention_signals: To maintain a traceable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item in a development channel.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item from a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped link between a channel and a board item, supporting audit and navigation without embedding the board content itself.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata record in the dragnet-development channel that references board item d90ca9a0 as a board_items attachment created on 2026-06-24.
intention_for_embedding: To record and preserve the association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
